side_effects.description: Anaphylactic shock: body dropped to floor, twisted knee, urinary incontinence, vomiting, severe urge to defecate, loss of consciousness, tachycardia, full body erythema (redness), profuse sweating, shivering/alternating hot and cold, inability to stand or move to reach phone, loss of motor control
Knee injury from fall during anaphylactic episode requiring months of rehabilitation

protocol_notes: 15 years of peptide use. First severe anaphylactic episode in 15-year history. Took 2 Benadryl before first loss of consciousness which likely saved life. Now carries EpiPen and antihistamines when using new peptides and notifies spouse.
